description:
SUBSCRIBE TO WATCH THE VIDEOS FIRST 
https://www.youtube.com/@govclose/?sub_confirmation=1

FREE Training: https://www.govclose.com

Schedule a Enrollment Consultation: https://www.govclose.com/enrollment-interview

GovClose Certification OVERVIEW: https://www.govclose.com/govclose-certification-program

Welcome to the most comprehensive breakdown of how to win government contracts in 2025.

In this 3-hour GovCon masterclass, you’ll hear real coaching calls, live federal sales training, and insider interviews with professionals who are actively building government contracting consulting businesses or scaling B2G sales teams.

Whether you're trying to:

Become a federal sales consultant
Win your first government contract
Replace your salary with GovCon revenue
Understand the federal acquisition lifecycle
Learn how to sell to the government without experience
...this video will walk you through proven strategies used by high-performing consultants, small business owners, and executives selling to agencies like the VA, DoD, DHS, and GSA.

Watch Next: How to land a government contract client
https://youtu.be/ETCClaw-los


What You’ll Learn in This Video:
How to find government contract opportunities before the RFP drops
How to conduct market research with USAspending.gov and SAM.gov
What to say on cold calls to contracting officers and program managers
How to build a federal sales pipeline based on actual funding and need
Why proposals fail and how to build relationships that convert
The FAR clauses that quietly destroy your profit margins
How certified GovClose consultants are landing $10K–$30K retainers

Who This Is For:
Military veterans transitioning into government consulting
Federal employees and contractors launching independent businesses
Companies trying to win more federal contracts with less competition
Sales executives breaking into public sector sales
Professionals seeking recurring revenue through federal contracts

In the GovClose Certification Program, our students learn how to:

Build a consulting business advising companies on government contracts.
Land high-paying roles as federal sales professionals.
Generate recurring revenue through relationship-first government sales.
Reverse-engineer agency priorities to create pipelines that actually close.

JOIN the GovClose Community
RING the bell 🔔 on my LinkedIn profile for real-world GovCon insights
👉 https://www.linkedin.com/in/govclose/
Visit https://govclose.com to start your journey

00:00 Intro 
03:21 What’s the most common mistake  in government sales?
07:42 How can you identify opportunities before an RFP is released?
14:10 What makes a federal pipeline worth pursuing?
18:35 Why do some buyers stop responding after initial interest?
22:37 How do you know when to walk away from a government buyer?
28:55 What happens during a successful federal sales call?
35:33 Why is building relationships more important than proposals?
41:20 Is there a better alternative to SAM.gov for finding opportunities?
48:45 How do GovClose graduates land high-paying public-sector roles?
54:12 Final Thoughts – What it really takes to win in federal contracting
01:03:08 How do I find buyers that actually have money to spend?
01:13:27 What should I say on my first call with a government office?
01:23:44 How does a brand-new consultant win their first contract?
01:34:12 What are the best ways to track your government sales pipeline?
01:46:05 What’s the #1 red flag that a company is wasting time in GovCon?
01:55:26 What questions should you ask in a capability briefing?
02:04:19 What are the most overlooked FAR clauses that affect profit?
02:14:30 How do I use USAspending.gov to find competitors and pricing?
02:24:11 When should I introduce myself to a contracting officer?
02:34:55 Can you win contracts without using proposal writers?
02:45:12 What makes a GovClose-certified consultant stand out?
02:54:40 Final Thoughts – Strategy Over Proposals
